params.name: api_key
params.description: Your ExchangeRate-API dashboard API key.

params.name: base_code
params.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the base currency (e.g. USD).

items.docs: Returns the latest exchange rates from a given base currency to all supported currencies. Update frequency depends on plan tier (daily on Free, hourly on Pro, every 5 minutes on Business / Volume).

params.name: api_key
params.description: Your ExchangeRate-API dashboard API key.

params.name: base_code
params.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the base currency (e.g. USD).

params.name: target_code
params.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the target currency (e.g. EUR).

items.docs: Returns the exchange rate between a base and a target currency.

params.name: api_key
params.description: Your ExchangeRate-API dashboard API key.

params.name: base_code
params.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the base currency (e.g. USD).

params.name: target_code
params.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the target currency (e.g. EUR).

params.name: amount
params.description: Decimal amount to convert (xxxx.xxxx format).

items.docs: Returns the exchange rate between a base and a target currency along with the converted amount.

params.name: api_key
params.description: Your ExchangeRate-API dashboard API key.

params.name: base_code
params.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the base currency (e.g. USD).

params.name: target_code
params.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the target currency (e.g. EUR).

items.docs: Returns the exchange rate between a base and target currency along with enriched target currency metadata (country locale, two-letter country code, currency name, display symbol, flag URL). Only available on Business and Volume plans.

params.name: api_key
params.description: Your ExchangeRate-API dashboard API key.

params.name: base_code
params.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the base currency (e.g. USD).

params.name: year
params.description: Year for historical data (full four-digit year).

params.name: month
params.description: Month for historical data (1-12, no leading zero).

params.name: day
params.description: Day for historical data (1-31, no leading zero).

items.docs: Returns historical exchange rates for the given base currency on the specified date. Full currency support from 2021-01-01 onward; 35 currencies are available from 1990-01-01 to 2020-12-31. Only available on Pro, Business, and Volume plans.

params.name: api_key
params.description: Your ExchangeRate-API dashboard API key.

params.name: base_code
params.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the base currency (e.g. USD).

params.name: year
params.description: Year for historical data (full four-digit year).

params.name: month
params.description: Month for historical data (1-12, no leading zero).

params.name: day
params.description: Day for historical data (1-31, no leading zero).

params.name: amount
params.description: Decimal amount to convert (xxxx.xxxx format).

items.docs: Returns historical exchange rates plus converted amounts for the given base currency on the specified date.

params.name: api_key
params.description: Your ExchangeRate-API dashboard API key.

items.docs: Returns an array of all supported ISO 4217 currency codes and their full names.

params.name: api_key
params.description: Your ExchangeRate-API dashboard API key.

items.docs: Returns the plan quota, number of requests remaining in the current billing window, and refresh metadata for the API key.

params.name: base_code
params.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the base currency (e.g. USD).

items.docs: Returns the latest exchange rates from a base currency via the no-API-key Open Access endpoint (https://open.er-api.com/v6). Requires attribution back to exchangerate-api.com. Updates once daily and is rate limited.
